summary: Tested new Location Search feature in Business Registration Step 2 (Ubicación). All features working correctly: Nominatim address search, auto-fill of fields, and OpenStreetMap preview.

issues: ZIP code field may remain empty if Nominatim doesn't return postcode for the selected location (expected behavior, not a bug)

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/business/register accepts latitude and longitude - PASSED
Backend: Business registration works without lat/lng (optional fields) - PASSED
Backend: Business registration accepts null lat/lng - PASSED
Backend: Invalid latitude type (string) correctly rejected with 422 - PASSED
Backend: Nominatim API is accessible and returns results - PASSED
Frontend: Location search input exists with data-testid='location-search-input' - PASSED
Frontend: Typing address shows Nominatim results in dropdown with data-testid='location-results' - PASSED
Frontend: Selecting result auto-fills address, city, state, zip_code fields - PASSED
Frontend: Map preview (OpenStreetMap iframe) appears with data-testid='registration-map-preview' - PASSED
Frontend: Success toast 'Ubicación seleccionada' shown after selection - PASSED
Frontend: Debounce (400ms) working correctly for search input - PASSED
critical_code_review_comments: BusinessRegisterPage.jsx location search implementation is well-structured with proper debounce (400ms)
Nominatim API integration uses correct parameters (countrycodes, addressdetails, limit)
selectLocationResult correctly maps Nominatim response to formData fields
Map preview uses OpenStreetMap embed with correct bbox and marker coordinates
All required data-testid attributes are present for testing

test_credentials.note: No login required for business registration page testing

seed_data_creation: Created test businesses during pytest (TEST_Location_Business_*, TEST_NoLocation_Business_*, TEST_NullLocation_Business_*) - these are in pending status
context_for_next_testing_agent: Location search feature in business registration Step 2 fully tested. Nominatim API integration working. Map preview shows OpenStreetMap embed. Auto-fill works for address, city, state, zip_code. latitude/longitude are stored in formData and sent to backend on registration.

mocked_apis.note: Nominatim is a public free API (openstreetmap.org/search) - not mocked

map_preview.note: Shows OpenStreetMap iframe with marker at selected coordinates

auto_fill_fields.zip_code: WORKING (may be empty if Nominatim doesn't return postcode)

backend_lat_lng.note: BusinessCreate schema accepts Optional[float] for latitude/longitude
